Uses of Package

  • Classes in Unnamed Package used by Unnamed Package
    Class
    Description
    Coordinate
    Business class representing a geographic coordinate.
    DelaunayTriangle
    Geometry class representing a triangle in the Delaunay triangulation.
    FileSystem
    Abstraction layer for file-system operations on serialised maps.
    Hospital
    Business class representing a hospital in the emergency dispatch system.
    HospitalServiceType
     
    Map
    Descriptor for a named, formatted map file managed by the persistence layer.
    MapManager
    Central facade coordinating all domain objects of the Emergency Dispatcher.
    Patient
    Business class representing a patient in the emergency dispatch system.
    Person
    Abstract base class for all people tracked by the emergency dispatch system.
    VoronoiEdge
    Geometry class representing an edge of the Voronoi diagram.
    VoronoiZone
    Represents the geographic influence zone of a single hospital in the Voronoi diagram.
